name: openchat
description: OpenChat desktop app for LLM, MCP, and tool interaction transparency.
author: Ken Ross

scripts.dev:web: npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix server run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix server run start" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix server run build && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix client run dev" "wait-on tcp:5180 && cross-env OPENCHAT_DEV_URL=http://localhost:5180 electron desktop/main.mjs"
scripts.dev:watch: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix shared install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.build: npm --prefix shared run build && npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run prereq:desktop && npm run build && electron-builder --win --mac --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:unsigned: npm run prereq:desktop && npm run build && electron-builder --win --mac --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:all: npm run prereq:desktop && npm run build && electron-builder --win --mac --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:win: npm run prereq:desktop:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:win:arm64: npm run prereq:desktop:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --arm64 --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:mac: npm run prereq:desktop:mac && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.build:desktop:dir: npm run prereq:desktop:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir --publish never
